mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sync_batch_record (domain, data_date, batch_index, start_rank, end_rank, record_count, pull_status, insert_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{domain}, #{dataDate}, #{batchIndex}, #{startRank}, #{endRank}, #{recordCount}, 'SUCCESS', 'PENDING', NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE end_rank = VALUES(end_rank), record_count = VALUES(record_count), pull_status = 'SUCCESS', insert_status = 'PENDING', error_message = NULL, update_time = NOW()
